headline: Carney-Xi Tariff THAW 🌡️🍁 CANOLA SLAY 💦🚗
text:
Mark Carney 🍁👨‍💼 the CANADIAN DADDY PM 🏒🇨🇦 just DROPPED BOMBS 💣🤝 with XI JINPING 🐉👑 in Beijing's Great Hall 🏛️🔥 – TARIFFS SLASHED 🔪📉 from canola OIL DRAMA 😩🥬 85% to THICC 15% by March 1st 🗓️💨! Ottawa SIMPS for Chinese EVs 🚗⚡ at MFN 6.1% 🤑📈 but CAPS 'em at 49K units 🚫🍆 to save CANUCK automakers from CHINESE FLOOD 💦🌊 – no BYD BYE-BYE invasion 😂🚫! LOBSTERS 🦞 CRABS 🦀 and PEAS 🟢 getting TARIFF LUBE too 😏💦 after Beijing's $2BN REVENGE TAX 🧂🥬 on CANADIAN FARMS last year 📉10% imports CRASHED 😢!

Years of TIT-FOR-TAT 🥊💥 STRAINED BEEF – remember Meng Wanzhou Huawei QUEEN 👸📱 ARRESTED 2018 🚔, China SNATCHES TWO MICHAELS 👨‍💼🕵️ Kovrig & Spavor on SPY VIBES 🕶️🔒 (FREED 2021 🙌) – but Carney's FIRST PM VISIT in DECADE 👀🌍 RESETTING like Trudeau's 2017 honeymoon 😍🍯 GONE SOUR 🍋! Xi hails TURNAROUND 🔄❤️ 'WIN-WIN' 🤑🤝 for WORLD PEACE ✌️🌍 – Carney DIVERSIFYING from TRUMP TARIFF CHAOS 🍊📉 'US BIG BRO but CHINA PREDICTABLE bby' 😏🇨🇳 dodging Donnie's on-off DRAMA 💃🕺!

Carney SPILLS TEA ☕ to REPORTERS: 'RED LINES 🚩 on HUMAN RIGHTS 👥❌, ELECTION MEDDLING 🗳️🚫, TAIWAN 🏝️🇹🇼 & Jimmy Lai LOCKUP 🔒 – we TALK DIRECT 📢 no MEGAPHONE BULLHORN 🤐!' Narrow COOP on ENERGY 🔋 & TRADE 📦 – met EV BATTERY BOSSES 🪫🚗 and ENERGY GIANTS 🛢️ on arrival WED 🚀! THURS signed DEALS ✍️🤝 – Colin Robertson DIPO SIMP: 'MODEST RESET but REAL AF 😤 no BIG DREAMS 🌈!'

XI FLEXING 🌍 as STABLE DADDY 👑 vs US TARIFF PAIN 😩 – South Korea PREZ 🇰🇷, Ireland PM 🇮🇪 HIT BEIJING lately 👀, UK PM & German Chancellor incoming 🛬🛬! Carney: 'WORLD CHANGED 😱 NEW ORDER 🌐 – Canada positioning like CHESS MASTER ♟️🇨🇦!' Kovrig on X 🐦 warns: 'CHINESE NEGO SHARKS 🦈 calculating LEVERAGE 💪 – handle with DISCIPLINE 🏋️!' 100 CANUCKS JAILLED in China 📊🔒 – Carney vows NARROW VIBES with 'DIFFERENT SYSTEMS' 🤝❌ no full ORGY 💦👯‍♂️!

AMERICA'S DOORSTEP INVESTMENTS incoming 🇨🇳💰🍁 – Trump PUSHED ally to RIVAL 😂🍊🐉! Canola FARMERS 🎉🥬, EV DEALERS 🤑🚗 – GLOBAL TARIFF RELIEF WAVE 🌊📈 setting EXAMPLE for ALL simping from DC DUTY HELL 🔥📉! Carney-Xi BROmance 🌹 resetting CAN-CHINA to PROSPERITY PEAK 🤑🏔️ – no more STRAINED TIES, just SLICK TRADE SLIDE 😩💨‼️
